sections.paragraph:
- Original: Βαριωνᾶς

- Transliteration: Barionas

- Phonetic: bar-ee-oo-nas'

- Definition: Barjona = "son of Jonah"

1. the surname of the apostle Peter

- Origin: of Aramaic origin H1247 and H3124

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of Chaldee origin [H1247] and [H3124]; son of Jonas (or Jonah); Bar-jonas an Israelite: - Bar-jona.
